scenarios.title: C03 / G60 pressure window
scenarios.emphasis: Curated scenario #1: G60 shows a 19.4 drop in the applied-state preview.
scenarios.strategySummary: Prioritize G60 on C03, keep G25 / C08 in secondary watch, and keep the chart, alert table, and evidence drawer aligned to the BiLSTM run.

recommendations.action: Prioritize the focus route in the operator readout.
recommendations.reason: G60 carries the strongest 1h hotspot signal in the current BiLSTM run.
recommendations.effect: The focus bridge and alert list remain aligned with the most relevant route.

recommendations.action: Keep the secondary route under cross-check.
recommendations.reason: G25 is the next-most active hotspot and can compound congestion if it rises with G60.
recommendations.effect: Operators retain a fallback narrative instead of overfitting to one hotspot only.

recommendations.action: Cross-check metrics and architecture notes against the active model.
recommendations.reason: The cockpit now exposes model-specific runtime and evidence instead of a deferred placeholder.
recommendations.effect: Model switching remains honest across summary, chart, and evidence layers.

evaluationContext.summary: BiLSTM is the shipped 1h RMSE leader at 36.449. The next model is LSTM, trailing by 4.386 RMSE.

corridorContext.headline: D07-C01 remains the site-wide movement spine
corridorContext.detail: D07-C01 leads 15% of runtime corridor tracks in the SouthEast direction. The decision layer uses that as context only and does not claim a one-to-one corridor-to-route mapping.

evidenceLineage.label: BiLSTM runtime frame
evidenceLineage.detail: Scene dl300 at 2020-01-02T01:00:00 anchors the selected focus route/grid pair.

evidenceLineage.label: 1h ranking authority
evidenceLineage.detail: BiLSTM ranks #1 in the shipped 1h RMSE table, ahead of LSTM.

evidenceLineage.label: Deferred CLUS-03 boundary
evidenceLineage.detail: normalized_distances(60,90,0.03).pkl remains zero-byte at 代码依据/轨迹聚类/normalized_distances(60,90,0.03).pkl, so no fake noise re-clustering evidence is injected into this decision layer.

scenarios.honestBoundary: This applied-state preview is a curated, rule-driven offline comparison built from committed forecast outputs. It is not a live optimizer, and it does not reopen CLUS-03 while normalized_distances(60,90,0.03).pkl remains zero-byte.
